Partners

Back to Partners
Back to Partners
Partner Channels
Automated referral-partner nurture by category. v4/v5 simulates email touches and surfaces overdue personal touches.
Back to Partner Channels
Reports
A consolidated read-only view of partner pipeline, relationship-program progress, follow-ups, replies, email activity, and prospecting. Deeper detail lives in each surface.
Prospecting
Leads sourced from public market data: lot listings, development applications, building permits, and active builders. Logging a contact moves the record to the Partner directory with the method recorded.
Follow-ups
Every scheduled follow-up across lot agents and partners, soonest first. Set a Next action and a Next contact date when you log an activity and it lands here, assigned to whoever you picked.
Goals
Set and track quarterly goals to help your team consistently hit their targets.
Scorecard
Measurables auto-computed from your activity and pipeline, plus the weekly activity-points log. Green means on goal. Click any measurable cell to override a value.
